creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 211578
patch for multimedia/openshot

Use a new tag of v2.5.0.
Change how DISTVERSION are divided. This allows rewinding without increase PORTEPOCH.
Since the current maintainer understand FLAVOR a bit, FLAVOR will be supported.
Adding files/patch-MANIFEST.in prevents the installation of *.orig files created during patch phase.
Start to show that we use FreeBSD :)
